emails.subject: Legal Assistant Resume
emails.body: Legal Assistant Resume Richard, I work with Norma Villarreal in supporting the recruiting efforts for the Legal group. Attached is a resume of a Legal Assistant that we came across while trying to recruit her husband. Please contact if interested. Thanks Toni Graham ENA Human Resources. MB's Resume.doc

emails.subject: Re: Legal Assistant Resume
emails.body: Re: Legal Assistant Resume Thanks for the resume: however, we are not in the market for a litigation paralegal. Toni Graham@ENRON 10/12/2000 07:41 PM
